About.heading: About Us
About.intro: Empowering Cambodia's vibrant digital economy by connecting people, services, and communities through fast, reliable, and friendly super-app services.
About.welcomeDesc: At DurianX, we are dedicated to creating Cambodia's premier digital platform—an engine of opportunity and growth for the nation's vibrant ecosystem of entrepreneurs, merchants, and service providers. Our unwavering mission champions the backbone of Cambodia's economy: business owners, restaurant proprietors, and professional drivers who keep our communities thriving.
About.welcomeOverlayTitle: Empowering Local Communities Since Day One
About.collabSub: We partner with local stakeholders to design equitable, sustainable, and shared digital economies.
About.collabDesc1: We actively engage with partners to craft tools that solve genuine challenges and support growth.
About.collabDesc2: Our equitable partnership model is designed for sustainable, shared prosperity.
About.collabDesc3: A locally based team delivers accessible, responsive assistance for all partners.
About.forwardSub: Our vision, mission, and values serve as our north star, shaping every transaction and product.
About.missionDesc: To empower Cambodian merchants, drivers, and consumers through transparent, equitable, and advanced technology that promotes inclusive growth and innovation.
About.visionDesc: To be Cambodia's most trusted, indispensable super-app, seamlessly connecting people, services, and communities for an enhanced quality of life.
About.valuesDesc: To champion local empowerment through relentless innovation, building every interaction on a foundation of trust, reliability, and transparency for our entire community.
About.partnerSub: More Than a Service — A Growth Partner
About.merchantsDesc: Empower your business with tools designed to boost revenue and streamline your operations in Cambodia's digital marketplace.
About.merchantsBenefit3: Access to an urban audience valuing quality and reliability.
About.merchantsBenefit4: Access to technology that powers business growth.
About.banksDesc: Collaborate to expand payment ecosystems, bridge traditional banking with fintech, and reach unbanked or underbanked segments.
About.banksBenefit1: Integrate with the DurianX Wallet to expand payment reach.
About.banksBenefit2: Co-create tailored financial products like micro-loans and savings programs.
About.banksBenefit3: Accelerate Cambodia’s Fintech adoption safely and efficiently.
About.governmentDesc: Align with national policies to drive digital literacy, formalize micro-enterprises, and build green urban logistical networks.
About.governmentBenefit1: Enable digital economy policies through real-world implementation.
About.governmentBenefit2: Empower informal SMEs toward formal growth.
About.governmentBenefit3: Support sustainable urban environments with EV-First logistics.

Partner.heroDesc: Join Cambodia's #1 super-app platform. Access millions of hungry customers, enjoy daily payouts, transparent commissions, and dedicated local support.
Partner.catSub: We welcome every type of business. From restaurants to enterprises.
Partner.catRestaurantDesc: Restaurants, cafes, cloud kitchens, and food stalls. Get listed and start receiving orders within 48 hours.
Partner.catLogisticsDesc: Integrate your logistics business with DurianX and handle corporate-level delivery volumes seamlessly.
Partner.catFinanceDesc: Banks and fintech companies can expand their payment reach and co-create financial products with us.
Partner.catEnterpriseDesc: Large organizations can leverage our platform for corporate meals, commute management, and custom APIs.
Partner.whySub: Every feature and program is designed with your revenue and growth in mind.
Partner.why1Desc: Access Cambodia's largest digital customer base and significantly increase your monthly sales.
Partner.why2Desc: Tap into 2M+ active users across Phnom Penh and beyond with targeted discovery.
Partner.why3Desc: Our streamlined process gets your store live in as little as 48 hours from application.
Partner.why4Desc: Real-time sales analytics, customer insights, and performance dashboards at your fingertips.
Partner.why5Desc: Instant order alerts and updates keep you in sync with every customer interaction.
Partner.why6Desc: No hidden fees. Competitive commission rates and clear payout schedules from day one.
Partner.whyCardSub: Dedicated account managers for every partner
Partner.whyCardDesc: We don't just list your business — we actively help it grow with marketing support, promotional campaigns, and data-driven insights.
Partner.howSub: Our onboarding is simple, fast, and fully supported by our local team.
Partner.step1Desc: Fill out a quick form with your business details. Takes less than 5 minutes.
Partner.step2Desc: Our team reviews your application and gets back to you within 24 hours.
Partner.step3Desc: We help you set up your menu, storefront, and pricing on our platform.
Partner.step4Desc: Your store goes live, orders start flowing in, and you receive daily payouts.
Partner.benHeading: What You Get as a Partner
Partner.benSub: Comprehensive benefits tailored to support every stage of your business journey.
Partner.benTierDesc: For businesses ready to scale with DurianX's full ecosystem.
Partner.storySub: Real stories from real partners who transformed their business with us.
Partner.story1Quote: Since joining DurianX, our monthly orders tripled within two months. The daily payout feature really helped our cash flow.
Partner.story2Quote: We started getting orders from customers we never would have reached on our own. The support team was incredibly helpful during setup.
Partner.story3Quote: The analytics dashboard helped us understand our peak hours and optimize our staffing. A game-changer for our small business.
Partner.ctaDesc: Submit your application today and our local team will reach out within 24 hours to guide you through every step.
Partner.ctaPerk1: No joining fee — completely free to apply
Partner.ctaPerk2: Get approved and live within 48 hours
Partner.formMessagePlaceholder: Tell us a bit about your business...
Partner.formDisclaimer: We respect your privacy. No spam, ever.
Partner.formSuccessDesc: Thank you for applying. Our team will contact you within 24 hours to get you set up.
